title: fix swagger warnings
body:
swagger always showed a bunch of wanrings but it seems with the latest update in https://github.com/podman-container-tools/podman/pull/28809 we get the proper duplicat ename wanrings which have been causing problems for us since forever.

I would be good fi someone can go over this and fix as many as possible

```
../../test/tools/build/swagger generate spec -c go.podman.io/podman -x github.com/sigstore/rekor -x github.com/moby/moby/api/types/network -x github.com/docker/docker/api/types/network -x github.com/moby/moby/api -o swagger.yaml -i tags.yaml -w ./ -m
```
